Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "HUMANOIDS-0ED0-CE40" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0ed0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Humanoids.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0ED0 which copies 256 bytes of data from $0EE0 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $422D. However the true start address is $CE40.
Also removed an unnecessary copy of the BASIC ROM between $A000 and $BFFF in RAM before taking the dump.
